2025.1016.bio:
happy spookfest all blehizens!! hope you dont get too spooked.. @w@

# oracle
- __Numerous improvements to the oracle test are now bundled into this release__
- __Cover arts are now loaded from oracle/hoshino sources if possible__
    - When browsing album pages and viewing album grids, the artwork url is now cached and used if needed.
    - When you encounter a track that has been cached by oracle (in a tracklist) or are on the track page, the artwork is now replaced to fit the album that was found.
- Blank disambiguation marker is now preferred over a ‘clean’ entry
- All featured artists are now checked, improving accuracy of feature detection
- Corrected weird usages of dashes and apostrophes
- Added `@connect` url to prevent options
- Tweaked design of music labels
- There may be cache issues (like overflowing) when using oracle, you can manage your cache in the ‘playback’ tab and clear away entries to save space for now

# Music
- __Fixed date range and various popups not closing as expected__
- Fixed links created by bleh looking different in encoding to Last.fm
    - Should fix difficulties in accessing artists with `+` in their name and things like that
- Fixed auto correct scrobbles option
    - Also now patched the playback preference option

# Design
- __Refreshed the halloween seasonal decorations__
- __Improved mobile navigation support!!__
- __Improved readability of grid text__
    - Also reduced the gap in between each grid item to prioritise artwork
- Redesigned radio buttons to match checkboxes
- You can now colour tracks in all places based on album cover
- Fixed the ‘Purple’ preset being orange during halloween
- Added an optional noise/grain overlay like before
- Usernames are now coloured based on ur badge in more places again
- Broadened usage of ‘solarium’ glass filter
- Tweaked design of buttons, links, playcount bars, music links, and more
- Entering a previously ‘invalid’ banner (not a url) will now simply use your accent colour
- Adjusted animations for tooltips and modals

# Other
- Fixed crash related to changing your language
- Hopefully reduced mutation loops by ignoring tooltips
- Fixed stylesheets re-activating in labs and playback
2025.1016.name: hoshino

2025.0929.bio:
hello!!! this is the latest monthly release for September, with a lot of major changes packed inside.

# ‘bleh’ Discord server
- __Join the official new [‘bleh’ Discord server](https://discord.gg/xU9KxGQpVw)__

# oracle
- __You can participate in the open alpha testing for ‘oracle’, a redesigned music view__
    - ‘oracle’ is a complete refresh of how album and track information is gathered and displayed to you, now powered by [MusicBrainz](https://musicbrainz.org) and community contributions via [oracle](https://github.com/katelyynn/oracle) for any fixes needed to said data.
    - The goal is to show accurate tracklists for albums - and link back to the correct albums on track pages.
    - As said previously, it is in early *alpha* and will not be the default for a while. To start using the alpha, head to the ‘Playback’ tab in settings and scroll to the bottom.
    - This is where a lot of the work went into in this release, so any feedback and suggestions is appreciated - it’ll be a long time until this is perfected.

# Profiles
- Increased the amount of recognised profile links
    - You will now see proper icons, auto-filled names, and brand colouring for said links
- Added ‘Scrobble’ as a quick access option
- Hover over the info tip to view extended features being used on a profile
    - Displays if a profile accent and/or banner is present

# Music
- __Introduced new artwork uploader__
    - Now supports a simple drag-and-drop from your Finder to Last.fm
- __You can now customise which links to display for artists, albums, and tracks__
    - Head to the ‘Interface’ settings tab and choose which services you most commonly use
- __Introduced a new title romanisation option__
    - Supported for Japanese and Korean scripts, you can now locally convert artist, album, and track titles into their romanised counterparts, e.g. メズマライザー → Mezumaraizaa
- __Right-clicking will now open a menu on grid items__
    - From here, you can quickly access the artist, photos, wiki, listeners, shouts, and tags – with additional options for expanding the artwork to it’s full size and a copy link button.
- __Added ‘viewing any track’ as a valid option for context-based colours__
    - In simpler terms, you can now have all your recent tracks be coloured based on your album artwork - as appose to only your currently scrobbling track
- Removed the Bulk Edit dependent album name in tracklist setting
    - It was causing more issues than it was solving and also never worked in the same way the original extension did. Use the in-built ‘extend track height to show album text’ option as a replacement.
- Finally updated the ‘top listeners’ preview on artist pages
- ‘Popular now’ no longer uses it’s music video for cover art
- Fixed various cases where lotus was not present
- ‘Explore in library’ is now present on search pages
- Combined artist profiles can now be fixed via lotus
- Adjusted collage defaults

# Markdown
- __Re-clarified wording when clicking links__
    - Easier to understand what will happen if you accept the link, especially if it will open an application on your device
- __Fixed blockquotes and user mentions triggering accidentally__
    - To trigger a blockquote, there must now be a space after the `>` character, similarily for user mentions if two or more `@` symbols are present it no longer becomes a mention. @w@
- __Added ‘Preview’ button when writing a shout__

# Design
- __Finally released the ‘Auto’ theme__
    - This matches your bleh theme to whichever theme is active on your system. You can hit ‘change schedule’ to choose which bleh theme to use for daytime and night.
- __Introduced ‘solarium’ glass effects__
    - Present on page sidebars, toolbars, the gallery preview pane, context menus, and floating windows. If you notice any performance degrade from this, head to the settings (Visual tab) and turn it off.
- __Redesigned inbox notification bubble to be more apparent__
    - Now glows with your accent colour once again
- Added icons for event year tabs
- Brought back theme previews when selecting your theme fully
- Changed settings list design from vertical to horizontal
- Fixed various issues with seasonal default colours
- Fixed setup, API, and authorisation panels being vertically too low
- Adjusted button and chartlist bar sizing
- Adjusted design of profile badges slightly
- Returned Noto Sans variants for other scripts
- Returned the header on search pages that was present last year
- Redesigned user popup to be more inline with others
- Added subtle text shadow to tabs to help with readability in poor contrast scenarios
- Added header labels to some context and select menus

# Language
- __Svenska translation by @Lrexie__
- Fixed number parsing in Svenska
- When viewing the language list in settings, profile names are now links

# Other
- Fixed badge name colours in shouts being applied inconsistently
- New song tags have been introduced
- Fixed colons in song tags not being removed properly
- Fixed activity link on profile being inaccurate
- Adjusted collage to use an svg-based logo instead of text to fix Chrome alignment issues
- Fixed edit scrobble modal overflowing text
- Fixed overflowing text for artist, album, and track headers
- Cleaned up legacy profile shortcut references
- Fixed event listing causing crashes
- Scrobble errors are now reported correctly
- Adjusted default font weights to be more readable
- Adjusted rain to be based on page container height
- Fixed #1 star on obsessions no longer being visible
- Begun pathway to releasing as a Chrome and Firefox extension
- Card saturation vibrancy is now disabled in light theme
- Album text in tracklists is now disabled if column view is also disabled
- Fixed requesting `value()` for a select menu returning an incorrect response
- Fixed modal blurs on profiles and various interfaces
- Fixed page styling being unavailable on ‘Playback’ settings tab
- Adjusted about me previews
- Fixed wikis not being parsed properly on some pages
- Fixed redirect bar showing up accidentally
- Fixed various cases where links would be double encoded then not properly double decoded
    - Noticeable for artists who’s name includes `+`
- Fixed headers and line breaks in changelog
- Fixed version being dropped from your settings file
2025.0929.name: alice

2025.0831.bio:
hey this is the overdue monthly release for bleh – which!! has been getting a lot of attention recently so thank u for the love @w@

# Notice
- **If you didn’t see the warning or accidentally dismissed it when installing this update, please check you don’t have two instances of bleh installed. A weird quirk with how these extensions work is causing this version to act as a completely new script, so double-check!! >-<**

# Profiles
- __Introduced customisable profile accents for sponsors!__
    - A new ‘thank you :3’ reward for the sponsors of bleh, head to your user settings and you can pick a colour to brand your profile visible to every user
- __Extended markdown support to allow cool things__
    - Check out the new in-built markdown guide inside bleh to learn the basics – it’s found right below your about me box when editing!!
    - Try out `[left]`, `[right]`, and `[center` in your profile bio to align text to the way you desire (you need to also end with eg. `[/left]` so like `[center]hai im in the middle[/center]`).
    - There’s a new way to set a profile banner too! `[banner=url]` is the new recommended way to set your banner instead of the previous.
    - You can now also add formatted links to your socials! Wrap literal urls or formatted links with text inside a block of `[links] . . . [/links]` to have them display in a nice list with icons.
- __Extended the height of profile banners to be more unique__
    - Take over the entire top half of your profile to make your profile more your own!!
    - The ability to override profile banners with avatars now also only applies to **non-custom** images, aka. only ones sourced from the artist.
- __Re-arranged profile sidebars so you can see obsessions better__
- __Re-designed the way your taste compatibility is shown__
    - Very glowy now ~w~
- ‘aka.’ and ‘created’ for profiles are now cached so they display on subpages
- Changed design of badges to show text without hovering
- Redesigned event calendar icons to be cuter
- Finished migration of profile badges to support new version
    - Icons and colours can now also be loaded from the server to allow for seamless changes upon request
- __Added warning when clicking onto new links for the first time__
    - This is basically the norm in every single app now, if you click onto a new hostname (eg. google.com) for the first time, it’ll show a dialog asking if you really want to go there – along with a checkbox to hide it for next time you visit

# Friends
- __Re-introduced the ‘profile shortcut’ feature as an extension of the new ‘Friends’ feature__
    - Head to your bleh settings in the Profile tab and you can now add a list of your friends. In the future, this list will be used for showing what your friends are currently listening to and being able to see their individual plays on artists, albums, and tracks with a single click. For now, you can set your ‘profile shortcut’ using the new ‘starred friend’ option, which works the same but is now based on your bleh friends list.

# Music
- __Introduced a new default to ignore artist redirections__
    - Following the recent Last.fm updates to finally begin removing legacy redirections for artists like Travis Scott, bleh now automatically appends `+noredirect` to links you click to allow you to access the page you are most likely after. If this isn’t the case, you can disable in the ‘Music’ tab in Settings.
    - Along with this, ensure redirects are disabled in the *Last.fm ‘Website’ settings*
    - Page redirection notifications are now also disabled by default
- __The song tag library has expanded massively__
    - Thanks to pull requests primarily from @swiffyjk and @fr0r
- Fixed strange bulk edit conflict resulting in double album text
- __Fixed page toolbars being at the bottom in Chrome-based browsers__
    - Strange chrome incompatibility, worked just fine in Firefox
- __Introduced a new collage option for centered information__
- Tweaked the design of the social links to be more inviting
- Try out the new ‘Copy’ link when right-clicking tracks
- When navigating to the artist or album from the right-click menu, the links it uses should now be more accurate in some edge cases
- Fixed recent tracks on your homepage not being patched properly

# Inbox
- __Redesigned notification design from scratch__
    - Now fully built by bleh which took like forever to create and gather info for to work correctly but now it works and should be much clearer!!
- __Merged your notifications and mails together into one interface__
    - Next to your profile in the top-right you will now see a combined inbox button, on hover showing the counter for notifications and messages separately. On click opens a popup window showing your 5 most recent notifications and messages without having to swap pages.

# Navigation
- __You can now customise your ‘quick access’ links__
    - Head to the ‘Profiles’ tab in settings to customise what links you use the most and which you don’t need – this includes bringing back individual links to notifications and messages if those interest you!
- __There is now a nice … menu in the top bar to access bleh-related options__
    - Helps if you are in need of support for any issues, want to suggest feedback, want to quickly add a new lotus capitalisation correction, or to sponsor <3
- __With Last.fm Pro, you can now see your most recent track in your profile menu__
- The top header bar is now centered nicely

# Design
- __You can now pick the branding style__
    - Choose between the default ‘bleh’ wordmark or the classic Last.fm wordmark. Changes both the logo in the top left, the tab favicon, and tab title.
- __Started modernising the Last.fm ‘Website’ settings__
- __Your grid items will now look cleaner than ever__
    - I managed to remove those ugly clipping corners due to weird browser border radius nonsense bla bla bla
- Adjusted font weights for the default font
    - I realised it doesn’t make much sense having almost everything being a medium font weight rather than regular
- Many design tweaks have been made to various clickables and the like
- Adjusted the design of homepage headers to be smaller

# Localisation
- __Português translations included by @ArthRMH and @fr0r__

# Other
- __Upvoted shouts now have a green gradient on the right for better readability__
- Keybinds displayed will now match your operating system better
- There is now some support for non-authorised tabs (aka. not being logged in)
- Renamed ‘Overview’ tabs to ‘Home’
- You can now modify your quick switcher keybinds if conflicts arise
- Fixed the broken activity detection when loving tracks
- Cleared the placeholder redirect when going to your homepage via a url
- So much time went into refactoring the cache system and it broke so many times but it works now hopefully so umm yeah
- Fixed incorrect detection of pro status
- Fixed some minor issues with the gallery
2025.0831.name: yuzuha

2025.0729.bio:
HAIIIIII new small update :3 :3 :3

# Design
- __Adjusted gradients and colours to be prettier__
- __Inline tabs (aka. the second row of tabs below the main ones) are now contained in a cute vertical toolbar__
- Continued work on redesigning settings, now with the Appearance/Visual tab
- Fixed minor design issues from last update

# Minis
- __Migrated Collage and Compare tools to a new Minis section__
    - This will be the future home of any games, tools, or experiments that utilise yours and others music library.
- __Collage now generates a much shorter url and filesize__
    - The final resolution of the collage image is now capped rather than being unlimited like before. Along with this, the URL when clicking Open or Download is much shorter.

# Badges
- __Badges can now be loaded fully externally__
    - This means loading the badge icon and it's colours without having to download a new stylesheet!

# Other
- __In date pickers, you can now click the Edit icon to enter a manual date__
- __Fixed gallery pages crashing if no sort button was present__
- __Music pages with (Spotify) in the name now suggest the page without said tag__
- Fixed song tag extraction eating text in some scenarios
- When your shout fails to send, you will be sent a notification instead
- The update status is now reset after an update completes
- Added a silly local restriction message into the markdown parser
2025.0729.name: claire

2025.0715.bio:
hello!! it’s been over a month since the last release, so you can guarantee this has a lot of changes – i hope everything works well :3

# Collage
- __Re-built how collages are generated__
    - The size of a collage’s final output is now fully determined by the settings you choose – meaning you can make a 1x10 collage or a 16x9 collage or a usual square and everything works out. Do beware that currently large collages cause a *higher* file size, will most likely look into fixing this in a future release.
- __Disabling branding and grid gaps now removes all padding__
    - Meaning you can generate a clean grid that *only* contains your album artwork, no outer or inner black border – if that interests you.
- The new in-built Last.fm collage feature redirects to the bleh implementation
    - From my perspective, the bleh feature is better in every way (and open source) – so if something is missing compared to the Last.fm one, let me know or work on a contribution :3

# Design
- __Introduced new animations for grids, tracks, etc.__
    - Beautiful satisfying staggered animations, can disable with the reduced motion setting in ‘Accessibility’.
- __Included a new default font ‘Overpass’__
    - This replaces the previous default font ‘Ubuntu Sans’. If the font is not satisfactory to you, you can download any font from the internet (like Google Fonts) and change your font in the bleh ‘Appearance’ tab.
- __Unified all cards into a single card design__
- __Redesigned track menus from the ground up__
    - Made from scratch within bleh now!! There may be some issues that were not caught due to having to work around the annoyance of Last.fm and it’s usage of Vue (destroying element context). Should still have bulk edit functionality, and if not click the play count bar to head directly to it’s page in your library and a big bulk edit option is always available.
- __Refactored gradient for artist plays__
    - The transition between play counts is now actually a working gradient instead of a half-kinda working thing. The appearance of play count bars has also been adjusted too.
- __Replaced mis-aligned buttons next to headers with links__
    - Takes effect across your profile and music pages like your recent tracks, top artists, an album’s tracklist, etc.
- __Aligned tracks in lists and removed individual borders__
- Redesigned the ‘side actions’ (buttons on the right-hand side of pages)
- If you have a profile banner active (`![banner](url to image)` in your bio), it is now also visible in the top-right profile menu, and various page banners (like settings and the Home).

# Quick switcher
- __Introduced a quick switcher__
    - Accessible with either ⌘ or Ctrl (depending on your system) – do ⌘K ⌘Comma or ⌘Q to open. Some browsers like to forcibly hijack some of those key combinations so alternatives were added in case.
- __Hit ⌘D to search globally__
    - This flow allows you to enter an artist, album, track, profile, or tag to quickly navigate to where you need to be – useful for when you know the exact spelling but don’t want to waste time searching in the default way.
- __Hit ⌘⇧K to run page-specific actions__
    - On pages that support the functionality, you can quickly navigate to a tab with just your keyboard in this menu.
- To accompany these shortcuts, a few extras have been added
    - Hit ⌘P to go to your profile, ⌘S for your profile shortcut, and ⌘B for the bleh settings.

# API
- __You can now link your account with bleh’s API__
    - The ‘bleh API’ is the Last.fm API in reality. Connecting your account in the ‘Profiles’ tab unlocks additional features – the first for now being:
- __Integrated ‘Scrobble’ buttons on your profile and music pages__
    - Ever been listening to a song but it doesn’t automatically scrobble? – Either try out the ‘New’ button on your profile or navigate to the page itself on Last.fm and hit ‘Scrobble’

# Components
- __Added a new date picker component__
    - This is currently used in the new ‘Scrobble’ feature and also replaces the Library’s legacy date pickers. Do let me know if you have any trouble with these components.

# Settings
- __Introduced a new updater__
    - Instead of being forced to update, you will be notified in the top left (next to the bleh logo) if an update has been found – or you can check for yourself in the bleh settings!!
- __Redesigned the theme picker__
- __Begun unifying settings together in a much nicer way__
- Introduced a new design for toggles, range sliders, buttons, and input boxes
- You can now view how many characters you have used in your profile bio again

# Music
- __Fixed the shout queue not working__
    - Shouts are now ‘parsed’ (turned into fancy text) one-by-one instead of all at once which should drastically improve loading times.
- __Refactored song tag extraction__
    - Should now be much more optimised than before which is especially useful due to the amount of tracks you can encounter on a single page.
- __Redesigned the edit and multiple bulk edit modals__
    - Fully bleh designed now, with checkboxes replacing the weird toggles from before and a nicer input box design.
- Details above listener graphs (listeners, scrobbles, etc.) are now smaller
    - Matches the sizing in your profile library.
- Redesigned featured items (artist’s most recent album and top track of the week)
- __Restored top albums of recent on ‘Albums’ tab__
    - Also fixed the sorting option disappearing at some point.
- __Fixed being unable to sort photos on an album page__
    - Same as above.
- Fixed capitalisation correction for the ‘About artist’ and ‘Featured on’ panels

# Profile
- __Your recent monthly listening graph now lazy loads__
    - Saves loading times in case you never end up scrolling down to view it.
- Fixed follow detection breaking due to recent changes
- Fixed the caching of profile banners being faulty
    - It should also no longer be able to remove your own profile from the cache storage.
- Fixed profile notes not working
    - You can also now leave notes on users you have blocked (or if they don’t have a bio), incase you find that useful.

# Seasonal
-  __Fixed timezones with a decimal offset breaking__
    - Seasons will now continue to function no matter what type of timezone you have active.

# Markdown
- __Extended the markdown support for legacy BBCode__
    - When profile bios or shouts use the wiki formatting for albums (such as `[album artist=ROSÉ]rosie[/album]`) it will now display as a real clickable link. This functionality used to exist in Last.fm but was removed with the 2015 redesign.
- Unified markdown support and link parsing together
    - Sounds very technical but essentially everything uses the same thing now so changes will happen faster and be less prone to issues.

# Other
- __Your current device platform is now detected__
    - This may be used more in the future for ensuring compatibility with certain features that only have significance on certain platforms – first is the ‘Emoji compatibility’ feature which is only really relevant on Windows 10 and below. This feature now automatically disables itself on macOS as it has no effect.
- __Fixed sponsor list failing to load causing issues__
    - Additionally, if you download a newer version of the sponsor list but are running an older version of bleh that doesn’t contain support for said badge, the badge will now display with a `?` icon.
- Redesigned the new bookmark modal
- When hovering over links on a profile or music wiki, a tooltip will display if the link is external
- Fixed loading of the wiki crashing if the wiki was too short
- Adjusted seasonal support due to new design changes
- Added a warning if you disable style loading by mistake and want to revert
2025.0715.name: fleur

2025.0608.name: homura
2025.0608.bio:
after 2-3 weeks the next version of bleh is now available :3 this update features a lot of polish, some new tools, and a LOT of work in the background.

# Collage
- __You can now generate 'collages' (aka. 'topsters', 'charts') on profiles__
    - Choose a timeframe, a type (albums, artists, tracks), a profile, a size (default is 5x5, maximum is 20x20), have a look through the options, then generate a collage image for download
- You can no longer start a collage or comparison when the profile has zero scrobbles

# Profile menu
- __Redesigned the profile menu__
    - The menu is now split into two sides with your avatar, name, badges, and shortcut on the left and your actions on the right split into pages. Same functionality, refined design.

# Design
- __Standardised a rounded, bordered design for all of bleh__
    - No more silly back-and-forth design changes like this from now on
- __Redesigned iconset__
    - New source for the icons, much cuter imo
- Updated design of user list in 'List' mode

# Structure
- __bleh now attempts to catch errors as early as possible__
    - Fingers-crossed this helps the weird 'black screen' issue people are encountering.
- __bleh has been 're-built' to use [lighterhtml](https://github.com/WebReflection/lighterhtml)__
    - This allows much easier development overall, majorly contributed by @yourfriendoss and the rest by me
    - There may be minor broken things due to this, those will be fixed most likely by the next update.
- __bleh will no longer crash if it can't load a profile badge__

# Notifications
- __Redesign notifications__
    - Notifications can now contain buttons and be paused on hover

# Settings
- __Fixed 'Avatar' colour option being incorrect sometimes__
- __Introduced new 'v2' settings components__
    - You will begin to see new text boxes (which support showing errors and submitting on pressing enter), menu buttons, and toggles

# Gallery
- You can now share gallery links

# Translations
- Translated to Português by @ArthRMH

# Other
- Fixed close button being disabled when uploading avatar
- Artist and album titles are now corrected in your Bookmarks and the Releases page
- Fixed broken deleted shout icon and menu positioning
- Fixed artist activities having a broken tooltip
- Made side actions colourful on hover
- Made 'New' badges more subtle
- Fixed coloured shadow under no-cover grid items
- Added jsdoc to a few functions
- The sponsor list is now only updated if a higher version
- Fixed blank obsessor avatar
- Feature flags are now locked behind a developer prompt
- Redesigned update flow a bit

2025.0522.name: wickes
2025.0522.bio:
# Browsing
- __When changing pages, there is now a subtle loading bar__
    - Gives the illusion of faster loading times

# Profiles & Music
- __You can now compare your taste with anyone on their profile__
    - Simply click the new 'Compare' button on profiles, pick a time range, number of pages (from 50/1 to 200/4), and a type (artists, albums, and tracks) and view your shared interests
    - When browsing other's libraries the 'Compare' button takes place of the 'Velocity' link
- __Redesigned the sidebar buttons to allow future buttons__
    - It may take a little to get used to but trust me they're better
- You are now prompted before overwriting your profile shortcut
- Redesigned the look of stats above graphs
- When viewing friends, their 'About Me' preview now looks fancy

# Settings
- __Redesigned avatar uploader flow__
    - You can now preview the image you're uploading along with a much prettier design!
- __Redesigned the Text settings tab__
- The generic 'welcome back' home text is now time-based
- You can now view a countdown until the next season
- Design improvements have been made to modal footers
- Improved design of import, export, and reset modals a bit
- Added pretty animations to modals
    - Can be disabled with reduced motion

# Tracks
- Active track menu and play buttons now match the colourful background

# Mobile support
- __Improved mobile support greatly__
    - Try it out if you desire

# Other
- Re-aligned and changed design of tabs slightly
- Fixed some page titles lacking linked translations
- A lot of legacy translations have been moved to the new system
- Removed legacy tooltip on music page listens
- Added basic PWA support (but sadly useless on iOS at least)
    - Essentially, bleh now adds the headers required to add an app as a PWA on iOS, but unfortunately extensions do not load in said PWA
- You can now choose the branch to load the JS from
    - CSS will still be loaded via defaults due to limitations

2025.0514.name: corinnnnn
2025.0514.bio:
# Music
- Added Tidal as a link
- Fixed searches with spaces in them
- Fixed '(orchestral version)' tags

# Mobile
- __Started work on mobile usability__

# Other
- Forced English for legacy translations

2025.0512.name: corin hotfix
2025.0512.bio:
hii everyone :3 i recently announced the [release of bleh on reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/lastfm/comments/1kkc9fz/i_have_created_a_scripttheme_combination_that/) if you haven't seen, thank u all for the love <3

# Settings
- Added checkmark on selected colour
- Changed the style of sliders slightly

# Home
- Fixed placeholder recommended item backgrounds

# Other
- Fixed ads leaving strange gaps (even with adblocker seemingly?)
- Fixed 'multi is not defined'
- New cuter bleh logo :3
- New cuter and more minimal dev indicator
- Changed changelog important text slightly
- Fixed gallery pages having broken tab title

2025.0511.name: corin
2025.0511.bio:
this is probably the biggest update since the big redesign so hello :3 at this point i now consider bleh ready for wider release, as always bug reports are open if you find any issues with this release!!

# Themes
- __Added new 'Ink' theme, based on e-ink displays__
    - A nice in-between of 'Light' and 'Ash'. Use the card background vibrancy slider to adjust colour saturation.
- Minor light theme improvements

# Music
- __Redesigned how tracks look to match streaming services and look cleaner__
- __Smart music titles are now shown in obsessions, featured tracks, activities, and album grids__
- __Finally updated obsession views__
- __Added 'Search' button to view artist guest appearances easier__
- Improved the look of the glacier library search modal
- Adjusted how song tags in headers are displayed to hopefully behave better on multiple lines
- Updated tag pages a lot
- Redesigned playlist list
    - Playlists are still a big wokr in progress though
- Fixed duplicate remaster detection
- Fixed glacier charts not updating when navigating between profiles
- Fixed timestamp not showing when hovering over tracks
- Added shadow behind text to be more readable
- Added fancy new listening report buttons
- Added link to 'Velocity' labs experiment in Library

# Settings
- __Redesigned and unified how setting components are displayed__
- __Redesigned Music and Profiles bleh setting tabs__
- __Redesigned the Profile and Website Last.fm setting tabs__
- Some settings now notify page refresh when not in settings
- Made glacier library settings dynamic

# Setup
- __Redesigned first-time setup completely__
    - Check it out if you like, [open setup](/bleh/setup)

# Seasonal
- __Simplified seasonal settings__

# Sponsor
- __New cuter sponsorship modal!__
- Added sponsor notes in bleh settings and news modal
- Standardised sponsor detection
    - Now requires a refresh if you just became a sponsor and downloaded new data

# Translations
- Moved entire page tab title system to new simplified system
- __Re-wrote a lot of translations and merged to new system__
- __Updated Deutsch translations__

# Home
- Made further progress on home recommendations
- The Events homepage is now accessible and useable

# Other

- Reduced transition time to feel snappier
- Improved how footer links look
- Hidden simulate scroll scrollbar as unneeded
- Standardised the look of alerts and no data messages
- Updated menu design
- Updated avatar popover
- Updated how count badges are themed
- Cleaned up how the 'Friends' tab is created
- Changed how ads are handled
- Updated new account notifications
- Added new tab favicon that matches your system theme
- Fixed missing page name when navigating to bleh settings
- Changed `cutensilly` references to new name
- Fixed 'of BTS' artists
- Removed unused '--b10' class
- Moved obsession list pagination to panel

2025.0428.name: wakaba!
2025.0428.bio: Improved look of links, event previews, fixed album lightness leaving behind and more.

2025.0427.name: wakaba
2025.0427.bio:
# Profiles, Artists, Albums, and Tracks
- __Refreshed how information is displayed__
    - Wiki previews are now bigger along with related information. Scroll to the side to view any extra information that's cut off.
- __More quick links are now available for music pages__
    - Such as quick lyric searching on Genius, quick album rating on AOTY and RYM, and more.
- __Refreshed the 'About artist' panel and moved to the side__
- Tabs are now available on all overview pages
    - Say goodbye to tabs jumping around and disappearing.
- Improved the look and feel of tags

# Appearance
- __Refreshed design of colour swatches and theme previews__
- __You can now convert RGB to a HSL preset__
- Moved font settings to Appearance tab
- Moved colour gradient settings to Music tab

# Navigation
- Moved language settings into your profile menu

# lotus
- Added a quick correction notice on the bottom right of each page
    - Displays whether a correction is active and a link to fix it if needed.

# Translations
- Updated German translations (mainly copying to new system)
- Fixed profile banner crashing on other languages

# Other
- When viewing listens from another user, the input field is automatically selected.
- Returned pretty animation curves
- Changed light theme design of floating side buttons
- Fixed up the new Last.fm labs promo

2025.0421.name: easter!!
2025.0421.bio:
happy easter :3

# Colours

- Added back the select arrows for 'Seasonal' and 'Customise' dropdowns

# Seasonal
- Fixed wordmark for pride month

2025.0414.name: arf arf
2025.0414.bio:
# Home
- __Refined home experience__
    - The Home tab has been merged with related pages to bring a unified experience or something like that. This is still a **work in progress** and was originally going to release at a later date but is bundled in this major update.

# Navigation
- __Fixed recent Last.fm change__
    - It will look basically identical to before except 'Music' and 'Charts' tabs are now gone as they are accessible by clicking the cute *bleh* logo. In the future, this button may have an option to change it's default destination.

# Branding
- __Changed the bleh logo to be cuter__

# Build
- __bleh now uses ESMBuild__
    - Thanks to the lovely work by @yourfriendoss. If you encounter any issues please report on GitHub.

# Other
- __Redesigned the profile settings a bit__
    - Now with a banner and about me live preview!
- Begun work on changing the translation system
    - This will result in translation keys also being modernised.

2025.0402.name: redesign!! i suppose!!
2025.0402.bio:
its here finally sorry it took so long!! ive been going back and forth in my mind since the start of the year on bleh's design and originally had a much broader redesign planned, which ended up getting scrapped and turned into the hybrid design we have now :3 is it the best? in my opinion, no, but ive spent too much time on it at this point and need to just lift it off my shoulders so i can work on other things 😭

because of that this wont be a normal changelog, go look around!!

^~^

2025.0201.name: notificationz
2025.0201.bio:
just a minor bugfix update as monthly listening reports will be rolling out and everyone will see this bug lol. big final bleh redesign soon<3

2025.0125.name: mouse pt. 2

    - Still a work-in-progress in some areas

# Settings

2025.0124.name: mouse
2025.0124.bio:
# Settings
- __Redesigned the colour selector page from the ground up__
    - Automatically generated, built on the latest designs, etc.
- Seasonal colours are now displayed in a dropdown when applicable
- The 'create a colour' modal has been replaced

![colours!!](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/colours.png)

# Tracks
- __Now playing tracks are coloured based on album art by default__
- __Fixed HTML tags displaying in tracklists__

![haiii](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/sanitise.png)

# UI
- __Animations have been completely re-thought out__
    - Mostly quick fades to make the world of bleh:tm: feel more responsive.
- Cards, menus, and modals now have borders in all themes again
- Menus are now more rounded to fit menu items
- 'Special' (coloured) menu items now have more opaque hover backgrounds
- Standardised spacing in menus
- Tooltips now use their own background layer
- Greatly increased shadows behinds cards and modals
- Increased roundness of cards and modals
- Fixed gallery button colours
- Fixed minor footer issues and things with the previous release

# Wiki
- External links in wikis now have tooltips showing their destination

# API
- Added the ability to input an API key for future features
    - Hidden behind a feature flag right now fwiw.

# Setup
- Expanded width and jankily updated to support new colours
    - Redesign coming eventually hopefully..

2025.0118.name: raaah
2025.0118.bio:
# Music and Library
- __Artist pages that share multiple artists are now beginning to be detected__
    - This is very early work-in-progress and only visible at the top of artist pages at the moment. Will be expanded into tracklists and the 'about artist' panel etc. over time.
- Fixed `cta is null` bug in library pages
    - randomly encountered it last night
- Fixed wiki breakage on pages with a wiki button as appose to text
- When a tracklist is inaccessible, the info box is now translatable
- More tags are now supported when formatting features
    - Such as `(Spotify)`

# Navigation
- Selected tabs now use your primary colour

# Modals
- Modal footers have been adjusted

# Log in / Sign up
- You can now access these pages again
- Made input boxes easier to see on these pages
- Added notification stating why bleh is not active

# Other
- Fixed crash when you have no notifications
- Fixed user buttons when hovering over avatar in wiki history
- Fixed margin on event select panel
- Moved activity list below reports
- Fixed highlight notification active colour
- The card background saturation slider is no longer accessible in light theme
    - It had no noticeable effect
- Pagination buttons now match normal buttons
- Card shadow in dark themes has been adjusted slightly

2025.0114.name: lotz of efficiency
2025.0114.bio:
hey!! this is the first minor? i guess release of the year. if you installed the last update (that'd be 2025.0113.2), you may have seen a warning about this update - turns out that wasn't necessary after all so oopsie :3 if you turned that off it seems you can safely turn it back on but it won't affect you either way.

anyway, here you go :3

# Loading
- __The way the stylesheet (eg. colours) and the main script (eg. layout) loads has been changed__
    - The stylesheet will now attempt to load as soon as the browser allows. **This essentially removes the majority of what I call 'white flashes' of unthemed Last.fm when it decides to randomly reload.**
    - The page will be cloaked in the background colour corresponding to your current theme (from light to midnight) until full loading is complete.
    - **If you were using Stylus to load the theme along with Tampermonkey, please try this out long term as Stylus is not recommended.**
    - Experiencing issues with this? Please reach out on Github.
- The method used to prevent style loading on Labs & Playback pages is probably optimised?

# Obsessions
- Made obsession grid layout match Last.fm to remove excess item on the bottom row
    - From six items per row to five, six felt better but it left this random item left alone at the bottom.

# 2025.0113.1
- Fixed crashes related to Pro accounts without custom badges

# Other
- Changed `run-at` to `document-start` to facilitate these changes
- Replaced tippy.js import to be both fixed to a version and import a version without bundled styling
    - This was causing the script to break in some extensions and was why I originally enabled that warning.
- Removed `addStyle` permission as it hasn't been in use for many months
- Fixed 503 error pages

i accidentally named this changelog file 2024 at first oops

2025.0113.bio:
heyy!! this is the first major release to celebrate 2025, i hope you all enjoy >.<

# Music
- __Fixed some pages (eg. Death Grips) being completely broken__
    - Death Grips seems to be specifically changed on Last.fm's side due to I guess the fact you can download their music? This was an actual nightmare to fix but it seems to all be working now on normal artist, album, tracks and specifically for Death Grips (both pro and non-pro).
- __Fixed page inconsistencies between pro and non-pro__
    - Weird spacing issues and anything related to the above.
- Added notice for pages with video previews disabled (once again, Death Grips)
- __There is now an additional + button next to listens to view for a specific user__
    - Saves the hassle of creating the URL yourself.
- User-created tags are now coloured on your end
- Viewing top listeners in the case either you or someone who has you ignored is present no longer crashes

![Custom user](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/custom.png)

# Shouts
- __The shout avatar hoverbox now includes three quick actions__
    - These allow you to view their profile, view their library, and leave them a shout :3
- __Your shout name colour now reflects your primary badge__
    - Shout name colours can be disabled per usual in the Accessibility settings.
- Your shout avatar now glows in the same colour as above

![New shout hoverbox](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/badge.png)

# Profiles
- __Artist and album grids now have a reflection of their primary colour below__
- __The primary colour algorithm for said grids has been swapped out to make more sense__
    - Vibrant.js was in use previously which proved to not work very well for a lot of cases.
- The full timestamp is now shown in the track hoverbox
- Fixed album name appearing as your profile name if album covers are turned off in your recent tracks
    - The album name not being visible is not a bug, it's a sad limitation as the album cover is required for the album title.
- Updated the design of listening report promo buttons

![Grid glow](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glow.png)

# Albums
- __The album cover now has a reflection of its primary colour below__

# Reports
- The top report card now matches your accent colour

# Library
- Viewing tracks in other people's libraries no longer crashes
- The 'jump to page' form is now finally styled properly

# UI
- __Your user link is now themed to your primary badge colour__
- Input boxes are now more visible in Light and Midnight themes
- Dropdown buttons in button groups now have an arrow animation again
- Sponsor and update buttons now use normal button styling

- Fixed alert icon disappearing when there was an error posting your shout/reply. Please try again. and again. and again.

# Inbox
- __Changed the design of notifications__
    - They now reflect the primary user colour, are more visible in the Midnight theme, and are language independent.
- __The header design for inbox pages has been redesigned__
- Message viewing now shows the user's primary colour on the left
    - I will redesign more of this page eventually but for now the header is also bigger.

# Notifications (bleh)
- __Changed the design and location of (bleh) notifications__
    - They can now include more detailed descriptions, handle icons better, appear longer, and are located on the right to get less in your way. I imagine in the future these notifications will be stored in a separate inbox.

# Seasonal
- Fixed negative timezone offsets breaking season calculations
    - It was calculating `-5000` instead of `-0500`, you will now see seasons again in these timezones.
- Fixed 'configure bleh' button showing text when no season is active
- Reduced height of card overlay gradients
- New Years now features a lesser ice overlay
    - Will be visible next year more clearly, less ice.

# macOS (Webkit)
thank you to @iwas15with100k for giving me a mac VM to test :3

- Fixed update checker breaking on Safari due to the version being wrapped in quotes
- Fixed incorrect height calculation of header causing it to be stuck at the top of the screen
- Fixed missing `-webkit-` prefixes for background blurs

# Settings
- __Redesigned the ignore list panel__
    - This now includes a new write-up of what 'ignoring' a user does, replacing the old one (which was also written by me, incase you were unaware).

![The evils](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/evils.png)

- __You can now configure avatar radius within the interface__
    - This existed for a whole year hidden but it's here now for those who want.
- The last.fm settings now uses the same header design as the rest of the site
- The subscription page has been modernised
- The automatic edits page now has a back button

# Events
- __Started redesign work on event edit and creation pages__

# Errors
- __When an error occurs, the dialog now shows detailed error information__
    - Helps massively if you are reporting issues.
- The page will no longer attempt to load if you reach a 404

# Setup
- The setup flow has had it's first redesign, with more to come until i'm happy with it

# Translations
- Bumped German (`de`) translations with help from @inozom

# Sponsors
- Updated sponsors for @iwas15with100k - thank you! (silly)

# Other
- Modals now use the same padding as cards
- Menus now have slight transparency and work consistently under different themes
- Changed the size of card headers to have an exact height of 32px
- Changelogs now include a data property for the build number
- Pages without `root` accessible will now prevent further load rather than crashing silently
- Fixed various instances where buttons using the `mimic-link` class were broken in the last release
- __Added debugging overlays for developing with bleh__
- Standardised user avatars to now use the legacy `--avatar-radius` css property
    - Now controlled as said previously in the settings interface.
- Fixed loading of settings css variables not respecting `unit` property
- `--g4` now matches `--l4` in saturation
- The css has been cleaned up a bit
- Changed the colour of the 'cute' special badge
- Updated design for feature flags page
- Fixed some minor leftovers in v4 listening reports
- Fixed inconsistent gap under top artist and album grids

surprise present :3

# Sponsoring

# Obsessions

![New obsession page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/obsess.png)

# Search

![New search page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/search.png)

2024.1223.name: Early presents
2024.1223.bio:
i am back after an AWFUL sickness with Lots of bleh-ness ready for christmas :3 its like a early present!!

# Navigation
- __Site-wide navigation has been modernised__
    - All tabs both at the top of the page and in subpages now resemble buttons and are much friendlier to click. A ringed outline is displayed around the currently focused tab.
- __The bleh settings now uses a row of tabs__
    - Finally matching the native last.fm settings
    - A lot of tabs with similar goals have been merged to make way for this change too, more steps to a less confusing settings.
- __The site-wide search bar is now easily accessible__
    - Rather than being hidden behind a broken button with an aging design it's now all front and centre!!
- __The current season along with a counter replaces the bleh settings button__
    - Hover over to see you can now get a live counter running when on the 'Seasonal' tab in settings :3

![New tabs](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/tabs.png)

![Search anywhere](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/search_anywhere.png)

![Live counting seasons](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/live.png)

# Performance
- __Intended performance tweaks are now in full effect__
    - This one performance tweak was supposed to be included a month or two ago but had a simple misspelling causing it not to work fully, now it does. In my testing, this is very very close to native speeds depending on the page now !!

# Auto-edits
- __The management page for album and track edits is finally done__
    - Up until this point the page had been left completely untouched since the bleh2 version of bleh (we're technically on 3 now). The white background seen with the Bulk Edit extension is also fixed.

![Auto-edit page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/edit.png)

# Shouts
- __The design for shout actions has changed to a popover__
    - This may be controversial! I get it, but i'd hope you can give it a try for a while before leaving feedback as a change being new can usually cause more hate than actually deserved. As always options can be provided for you to fine-tune the look you want in the future if this is wanted.

![Shout popover](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/shout.png)

# Music
- "A cappella" is now detected as a valid acapella variation
- Artist and album grid gloss overlay is fixed

# Settings
- The design for toggles and sliders has progressed
- Your avatar is now registered as the background properly
- Added a cute deep blue seasonal colour #toradora

# Translations
- Bumped Deutsch translation a bit with help from @inozom
- Fixed some missing translation keys causing errors
- Fixed missing translation keys language-wide for no season

# Other
- Fixed chart colours not updating when changing colour
- Redesigned input boxes slightly
- Minor page fixes
- Fixed seasonal colour alert height
- Removed bwaa leftovers in activities
- Adjusted some ice overlays particularily in menus

2024.1208.name: glacier library ^-^
2024.1208.bio:
i hope people enjoy tha library as i am quite proud of it myselfs.. ~w~ leave feedback in bleh issues if there's something you hav to suggest!

# Library
- __Introduced new awesome library redesign__
    - This has been a long-time coming and is a whole redesign of all aspects of the user library :3 Below i'll go through each change worth mentioning

![New library](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glacier_library.png)

- __The date graph is now custom-built with three display modes__
    - You can now choose between a line graph, pie chart, and bar chart. This preference is saved between tabs. You can click points on the graph just the same as before.
    - The date selector now also includes a handy link to the current year (2024) just in time for the end of the year.
    - Line graphs also now have their background colour a pretty gradient and that's cool!!!
    - There is a (probably slightly) higher chance you can get rate-limited now but in a world where using the Bulk Edit extension can load hundreds of pages that doesn't seem to be much of an issue. It's also a worthy compromise for pretty graphs i think.
    - If you absolutely HATE these graphs and want the old one back, simply use the handy configure button present on all library pages (or head to the Music tab in settings).

- __There are now additional 'insight' graphs based on the current tab__
    - These can show information on artists, albums, and tracks on a page (you can't have all three on page, you can have two at least). Hover over each slice of the pie to see what the item in question is, unfortunately clicking into them is not available... yet (will get to this soon hopefully).
    - No additional network requests are made for this graph to work as it utilises either the chartlist or grid already loaded :3
    - These do not appear on the scrobbles tab!!!

![New library graphs](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glacier_graphs.png)

- __Header cards on regular tabs are redesigned__
    - This redesign is the most similar to the previous design but essentially matches the rest of the recent bleh designs :3 This includes moving relavant buttons into their own group on the right with helpful text labels and icons.

- __Header cards when focused on an artist, album, or track have been redesigned too__
    - Along with the aftermentioned improvements, this panel now uses the lotus correction system. This supports the popular Bulk Edit extension out of the box so no need to worry there either.
    - Let me know if there's other extensions people use that hook into this area and are as such no longer visible in bleh, i'm not aware of any at the moment.

![Bulk edit integration](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/bulk.png)

- Artists in list view are now finally corrected
- Albums and tracks in list view should now be corrected properly regardless as language

- Tracks now show hover popups pretty much everywhere

# Profiles
- Recent (and) track panel configure menus now include bleh options
    - Very handy for some people most likely (including me for testing)
- Fixed activites sometimes displaying in a weird order

![Configuration menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/configure.png)

# Header
- Massively improved performance on the profile menu
    - This was done by completely removing the old menu provided by Last.fm which was still causing some slowdowns despite not being visible (silly)

# Other
- Changelogs now display myself in the header
    - Maybe other people will write changelogs someday o.O

- Chart colours are now only loaded when necessary, giving a potential (but minor) performance improvement.
- The same as above but for removing album-related page colouring when you exit a page.

2024.1204.name: glacier :3
2024.1204.bio:
merry christmas to those who celebrate :333 its my birthday this month so um wish me a happy birthday if u desire ~w~

# Library
- __Artist and album grids have been slightly modernised__
    - The primary colour from the image is now picked and used for the lower gradient as appose to the boring solid black. The line for the artist name and plays has now also been merged into one - if people would like this to be a setting, let me know :3
    - Pre-requisite to the upcoming library redesign <3

![New library grids](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/grid.png)

- Tracks no longer have a slide animation

# Pages
- __Page-related code now only runs once per page__
    - This feels WAY faster in my testing before release. While this may seem like a straightforward thing in retrospect it was a little more difficult than you'd expect. Using the system mentioned below and some additional tweaks it now no longer needs to run as much code to get the job done.
    - Along with this, recent activities and settings are no longer constantly loaded whenever any action is taken.
- Pages are now assigned automatically
    - This may not mean much unless you know how bleh works under-the-hood. To keep it simple, bleh is now smarter!! and can tell what type of page you are browsing on without having to do nearly as much detective work.

- Panel headers are now the same size as in bleh settings
    - Experimenting as usual! While it may feel off at first i'm sure people will get used to it.

- Listening reports have had some styling tweaks
    - (finally) enjoy your reports taking the full page width (and no broken yearly day charts!)

- The noise overlay is removed (temporarily?) (forever?)
    - just experimenting ~w~

# Seasonal
- Winter ice effects have been re-made from scratch!!
    - New overlays are also present at the top of the page, on interactables (buttons, toggles), and under navigation
- Seasonal overlays have had their look tweaked
    - The gradient no longer spans the entire card height, it's now only at the top as intended. This makes midnight theme a lot more oled-y during winter seasons.
- Slight optimisations have been made for seasonal overlay things
- Colours related to the Christmas season have had some changes

![Profile page during Christmas](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/glacier.png)

# Profiles
- Panel buttons on the main page have had a fresh coat of paint

# Dialogs and modals
- Dialogs have been completely re-built within bleh
    - If you can't notice a difference that's a good thing, I feel like they perform better but that might be placebo but who knows..

# Listeners
- __Top listeners for artists now match follow pages__
    - This means you can now choose between the same list and grid view modes and they will match this setting globally.
    - The position counter is now also accurate after page 1! This was originally added before bleh3 when this wasn't really possible, but that is no more.

# Shouts
- An initial attempt has been made to increase performance.
    - It isn't perfect at this time but shouts are now queued to have their fancy new-lines, bold text, etc. If there's some way to make this work in parallel it would help a lot.

# Other
- Dropdown selection buttons now flip their arrow when active
    - The arrow has also been swapped out

2024.1201.name: Reports
2024.1201.bio: Fixed listening reports not showing top card most likely due to new Last.fm changes.

2024.1120.name: Redesign improvements
2024.1120.bio:
This update is a little late (i got sidetracked) but it is now released in a complete-enough state. More changes will come when i'm a little more focused on the blehs.

# Settings
- __Continued redesign of bleh settings__
    - This was very much needed and will continue overtime :3
    - Settings now uses the header redesign seen across the site (not all icons are finished yet)
    - The 'Appearance' tab has seen a shift in layout too, with added subtext and the album colour toggle moved up to the colour selection (where it should've been)
- __'Customise' has changed into a new 'Layout' tab__
    - Here will be the home for customising page layouts for your profile, artists, albums, etc.
    - New in this tab is the ability to customise the action upon clicking avatars (default is still expand to full resolution) and the handy 'view photos' button on the right of artist pages.

![Layout tab](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/layout.png)

# Editing
- Fixed toggles being unable to click
    - Labels were still clickable but this was still annoying

2024.1113.name: Major redesign season
2024.1113.bio:
its hereeeeee :3 This is a bug push towards a formal bleh release and checks off a lot of boxes. bleh is very very chilly..

# Redesigns
- __Completely redesigned headers for events, albums, tracks, artists, and profiles__
    - This update is crucial in removing legacy bleh leftovers. As of now, these headers are fully custom-built and moves away from the precisely positioned header and navigation seen before. In simple terms, this makes the code much more straightforward and allows more flexibility to be possible with these designs in the future.
    - Top-left avatars are all clickable to reveal the highest quality image (same with event posters)
    - Track pages can now show the featured album cover in the top-left (not on subpages unfortunately)
    - Blurred backgrounds now appear on all these pages of the current image. For profiles, this can be configured in the settings much like before.

![Artist page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/artist.png)

- __Event pages have finally been redesigned__
    - Following with the header changes, event pages have seen a much needed refresh - go try it out :3
    - Lists of events on profiles and artist pages have also taken on this refresh.
    - Attendance pages now also include the view selector.
    - Some final tweaks may be made in the coming months or generally overtime.

![Event page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/event.png)

- The top-right profile menu is now custom-built
    - You may not notice a difference which is intentional, this simply improves performance drastically especially on old tabs.
- __The About artist panel has been redesigned__
    - Along with an updated design, this panel can now also display guest features on a song if enabled in settings.

![About artist panel](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/about.png)

# Profiles
- __You can now right-click the similar taste item to compare artists__

![Taste right-click menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/taste.png)

- You can now right-click tracks to view the menu
    - This will be used on artist/album grids and more in the future. For those who aren't too happy with it, an option will be available later on to disable.

![Track right-click menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/menu.png)

- __Configure menus now use the redesigned settings interface__
    - Very pretty :3

![Recent tracks menu](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/recent-menu.png)

- You can now see badges in user lists (eg. following list)
    - This also means you can see staff users more easily.

- Auto-edit windows now use bleh toggles as appose to checkboxes
    - Along with this there are some very minor spacing fixes.

# Customisation
- __You can now control background saturation__
    - The saturation of backgrounds in dark themes can now be further controlled from the accent saturation using the new background saturation slider.
    - You can see this in action earlier in this changelog :3

![Background saturation slider](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/saturation.png)

# Seasonal
- Season timings are now standardised solely in GMT+0000
    - While this may sound like a bad thing, this ensures there's no gap between one season ending and the other beginning (hopefully). Worth it in the end.

- Seasonal effects have had their (hopefully) final tweaks for Fall
- You can now decrease the amount of snow if needed for performance or accessibility

# Tags
- Tag pages have been given an initial redesign
    - More is to come in the future

2024.1109.name: Wiki improvements and more
2024.1109.bio:
# Wikis
- __Wiki pages have been redesigned__
    - This is less of a grand redesign compared to the recent gallery changes but still a massive improvement for those wiki editing (like myself)

![Wiki overview page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki.png)

Wiki overviews now have the two common action buttons located for easy access in the sidebar. The most recent wiki author is now also inline with the title.

![Wiki edit page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki-edit.png)

Wiki editing has received the biggest improvement in this update. The previously available wiki syntax guide is now accompanied with a selection of 6 symbol presets that can be used for writing wikis. These includes two stylised quotation marks, apostrophes, and two variations of the dash. Style rules have also been re-located into the sidebar to reduce the scrolling needed to save.

![Wiki history page](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/wiki-history.png)

The wiki history has now been updated to fit the overall aesthetic of today's bleh, including longer summaries depending on username width. These items now also display custom user badges and highlight staff members.

# Profiles
- Hovering over scrobbles now once again displays average
- Fixed icons for bookmarks in recent activity

# Theming
- __Massively improved readability in light theme__
    - There will most likely be one final pass on readability but here is a batch of improvements :3
    - Shadows beneath buttons have been decreased
    - New, pro, and vote badges now use a darker text
    - Notification bubbles now use a darker colour

# General
- Some web requests can now handle error responses
    - This allows bleh to recover in the event lotus or the changelog cannot be downloaded

2024.1108.name: Building on profiles
2024.1108.bio:
# Obsessions and messaging
- __Featured tracks on profiles have been re-implemented__

![Featured track panel seen below profile bio](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/obsession.png)

This involves more under-the-hood changes than in actual appearance but to keep it simple this replaces another janky leftover of bleh². I also took this opportunity to:
- __Move private messaging button to the follow row__

![Message button in its new location](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/message.png)

# Changelog system
- Improved styling of changelog items
- Added a button at the bottom of the modal to quickly shortcut to the latest major release (will be relocated most likely)

# Seasonal
- Announce new season change via notification

# General
- Fixed transparent cards (eg. full avatar windows) having borders in some themes

2024.1107.1.name: Checking off the list
2024.1107.1.bio:
- __Fixed image saving system for artists under `+noredirect`__
- Standardise changelog styling on all pages
- Standardise styling of modals and dropdowns
- Using the saved image tab shortcut no longer swaps back to the tab when changing pages

2024.1107.name: changelogs :3
2024.1107.bio:
Update changelogs are now available version per version, detailing updates in each build. Speaking of, here are the changes today:

- __Added a quick link to saved artist photos__

![Gallery image](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/saved_photos.png)

- First pass of light theme readability, there is more to come in the future
- Some top panel buttons have been moved into a ... menu for artists, albums, and tracks
- Custom charts now correctly update on theme change
- Minor bulk edit colour fix
- Improve optimisation of staff shouts and colour staff profiles

More changelogs will be added both retroactively to previous releases (cus there were cool ones trust) and for all future updates so you can stay informed on the update spam. I'm preparing for a true milestone release of bleh at some point so expect a lot of stability and general improvements to arrive in the run-up.

2024.1106.1.name: Gallery redesign is now live
2024.1106.1.bio:
Following (kinda) coincidentally with Last.fm's debut of album image saving, bleh now features a fully redesigned gallery page.

![Redesigned gallery image](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/bleh3-gallery.png)

# A walkthrough
Gallery pages have been restructured to place primary focus on the image in question, now stretching across both columns. To further help this, a new 'Expand' button is located below to view the image in it's full resolution. Along with this, a vote tally is now displayed taking the positive votes minus the negative votes to give you the current number used for ordering.

2024.1106.name: Last.fm fixes
2024.1106.bio: Pre-update fixes for Last.fm's latest auto-edit changes.
